response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of full-stack experience, and his recent roles map directly onto the primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, and MongoDB at Tencent, and current full-stack TypeScript/Node work at Naver that includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which satisfies the unusual AI agent development requirement. A deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), Docker/Kubernetes deployment experience, and a CS degree round out the profile. The main gaps are the absence of explicit NestJS and Vitest/Jest experience and thin Kotlin/Python coverage, which are learnable given the surrounding evidence, so an interview is clearly warranted.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with recent, direct TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS work at scale
Hands-on AI agent development: MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks in current role
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit NestJS or Vitest/Jest experience listed, both core to the primary stack
Limited exposure to Kotlin and Python; Java experience is brief and dated
Considerable investment in the niche DLang ecosystem and several short tenures raise focus and retention questions

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
